title: LaraPVP
description: Tired of clutter? LaraPVP is built for the elite. Experience a stunning deep purple overhaul that perfectly balances striking visuals with peak performance. Cut through the competition with zero lag and absolute clarity.
body:
### LaraPvP 2.0.0: The Royal Purple Update • Total Rebrand: Switched from blue to a sleek, Deep Purple aesthetic across all menus and icons. • Maximum Performance: Optimized textures for higher FPS and zero-stutter gameplay. • PvP Optimized: Added short swords, clear glass, and a new custom crosshair for better visibility. • Clean UI: Minimalist, transparent interface design for a clutter-free experience. ### UPD 1.2.1 • Villager GUI has been corrected. ### UPD 1.2.0 • new GUI update — modern & sleek • UI color sync • stability improvements
Menu ![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcf45968662431644c534939f86cfef60059945f.png)
### Got any ideas on how to make this resource pack even better? Drop them here! ↓ • DC:laralox1 ### Pack Features Features
ENG • PvP resource pack "LaraPvP" for Minecraft brings comfort and style to your gameplay. Features: • New sounds added • Armor, items, and blocks textures reworked • Custom Skybox (Day/Night) • Dark interface theme (GUI) • Custom main menu • Custom modern font • Custom crosshair • Small fire (PvP friendly) • FPS Optimized • For sky textures on Fabric, you need these mods: • [Skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify) • [FabricSkyBoxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit)
TR • Minecraft için "LaraPvP" kaynak paketi, oyununuza konfor ve stil getirir. Özellikler: • Yeni sesler eklendi • Zırh, eşya ve blok dokuları yenilendi • Özel Gökyüzü (Gece/Gündüz) • Karanlık arayüz teması (GUI) • Özel ana menü • Özel modern yazı tipi • Özel nişangah • Küçük ateş (PvP dostu) • FPS Optimizasyonu
